login.title: Welcome to Relio
login.subtitle: AI-powered relationship mediation
login.terms: By continuing, you agree to our

consent.title: Before we begin
consent.aiDisclosure: Relio uses AI to mediate conversations between you and your partner. This is NOT therapy and does NOT replace professional care.
consent.tier1: Private — Only you see your original messages
consent.tier2: Abstracted — AI profiles visible to clinicians only
consent.tier3: Shared — Reworded messages your partner sees
consent.dutyToWarn: Duty to Warn: If our AI detects imminent danger, we may break confidentiality per legal obligation.
consent.tosLabel: I accept the Terms of Service
consent.ageLabel: I confirm I am 18 years or older

onboarding.welcomeDesc: A safe space for couples to communicate better through AI-mediated conversations.
onboarding.privacyDesc: Your raw messages are private (Tier 1). Only AI-reworded versions are shared with your partner (Tier 3).

invite.title: Invite Your Partner
invite.subtitle: Share this code with your partner to start mediated conversations together.
invite.orScanQR: Or have them scan this QR code
invite.acceptSubtitle: Enter the 6-character code your partner shared with you.
invite.expired: This invite has expired. Ask your partner for a new one.

journal.title: Private Journal
journal.empty: Your private reflections will appear here

settings.title: Settings
settings.invitePartnerDesc: Share a link to invite your partner to Relio
settings.dataOnDeviceDesc: Journal entries, profile data. Encrypted via device Secure Enclave / Keystore.
settings.dataSentToServerDesc: Message text is sent for AI processing only. Raw Tier 1 messages are not stored on our servers.
settings.deleteConfirmMsg: This will permanently erase your private journal, profile, and all local data. This cannot be undone.
settings.reportAbuseDesc: If you or someone you know is in danger

crisis.title: We're here for you
crisis.message: Relio detected something that suggests you or someone you know may need support beyond what our AI can provide.
crisis.subtitle: You're not alone. Please reach out to one of these resources:
crisis.acknowledge: I have reviewed these resources and feel safe to continue

psychoeducation.title: Understanding Your Patterns
psychoeducation.floodingDesc: When emotions overwhelm your ability to think clearly. Your heart races, you feel defensive, and rational discussion becomes impossible.
psychoeducation.horsemenDesc: Criticism, Contempt, Defensiveness, and Stonewalling — the four communication patterns that predict relationship breakdown.
psychoeducation.bidsDesc: Small moments where one partner reaches out. Turning toward bids strengthens bonds; turning away erodes them over time.
psychoeducation.pursueDesc: One partner pushes for connection while the other retreats. This cycle escalates conflict and leaves both feeling unheard.

privacy.title: How Your Privacy Works
privacy.tier1Desc: Your raw message. Only you see this. Never shared.
privacy.tier2Desc: Anonymous patterns. No personal details. For AI learning only.
privacy.tier3Desc: AI-reworded version. This is what your partner sees.

attachment.title: Attachment Style Quiz
attachment.subtitle: Understanding your attachment style helps Relio personalize your experience.

account.deleteWarning: This will schedule your account for permanent deletion after a 24-hour grace period.
account.confirmPhrase: Type DELETE MY ACCOUNT to confirm
account.exportDesc: Download all your data in JSON format

notifications.inviteAccepted: Your partner has joined! Start your first session.
notifications.newMessage: You have a new mediated message waiting.
notifications.consentUpdate: We have updated our terms. Please review and accept to continue.
